name: Parmesan

pros.title: clear calcium identity
pros.explanation: That is a core category strength.

pros.title: slots into meals very easily
pros.explanation: Practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

pros.title: can be a very convenient protein vehicle
pros.explanation: Convenience is one of dairy’s strongest practical advantages.

cons.title: very dense and easy to overshoot
cons.explanation: The nutrient density is real, but so is the concentration.

cons.title: fat quality varies wildly across dairy
cons.explanation: Some dairy is clean, some really is not.

cons.title: processing changes the category a lot
cons.explanation: The label alone does not tell the whole story.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
